intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered — LOWER band of the 65-72 m² floor range. Master ensuite + common bath share a wet-core plumbing wall; the bath block sits between master (front) and standard (rear). Open-plan great room + kitchen. Squarish lot.
must_haves: common bath publicly accessible from great room
clustered baths (ensuite + common share a plumbing wall)
